CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.DragHint: Drag items here from character sheets to add them to the shared stash.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.DragHintStash: Drag items here from character sheets, or drag them back to a character.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.MoveConfirm: Move {name} from {actor} to the party stash?
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.StashCapacityHint: Maximum number of items the party stash can hold (0 = unlimited).
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.StashFull: The party stash is full! Maximum {capacity} items allowed. Remove some items or increase the capacity in module settings.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.ConfirmTransferHint: Show a confirmation dialog when moving items between characters and the stash.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.NoMembers: No party members available. Add characters to the group first.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.MinRoleHint: The minimum user role required to see and use the Shared Stash tab on the group sheet. Users below this role will only see the standard Members tab. Gamemasters always have access.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.NoPermission: You do not have permission to modify the party stash.
CRUCIBLE_PARTY_STASH.TemplateError: The stash panel failed to load. Check your browser console for details.
